description: Harden creator-facing analytics behavior with deeper QA around realtime refresh, growth-window semantics, and legacy public-data fallbacks.

userStories.title: Validate manual refresh transitions to realtime state
userStories.description: As a creator, I want manual refresh to visibly switch into an updating state and then return with fresh numbers so I trust the dashboard is live.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Atualizar agora moves the dashboard into refreshing state immediately
Refreshing state polls until fresh data is shown again
Button stays disabled while refresh is in progress
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Verify creator-facing growth-window signals
userStories.description: As a creator, I want to distinguish new posts from evergreen growers so the dashboard tells me whether growth came from fresh publishing or older winners.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard can show an older post that grew in the window alongside a newly published post
Older growing posts show window-growth signals without being mislabeled as new
New posts in the same window show the new-post signal distinctly
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Protect legacy public-data rendering
userStories.description: As a creator, I want older imported profiles to keep showing covers and basic public metrics so the dashboard does not degrade after schema changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Legacy provider payload fields can still hydrate thumbnail and basic public metrics
Basic public metrics do not regress to N/D when values exist only in the raw provider payload
